turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Booking or Changing a medical appointment ️ “Hi, I’d like to make an appointment to

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: see a doctor.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. What’s the reason for your visit today so I can book you with the right doctor?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I have a pain. A pain in my leg.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, leg pain — got it. When did the pain start?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: This pain started one week ago.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, one week ago — thanks. How would you describe the pain now: is it mild, moderate, or quite strong?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: My pain died when I, uh, drove my... ...joelho?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, I think you mean the pain got worse when you moved/bent your knee — “joelho” is “knee.” How strong is the pain now: mild, moderate, or strong?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I used to say this then. Maybe all the time I drove my knee, I feeling the pain.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, I understand — the pain comes every time you bend or move your knee. To book you with the right doctor, how strong does the pain feel right now: mild, moderate, or strong?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: So strong vent, I need... I need some... The... Doctor.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, it sounds like the pain is strong. When would you like to come in for the appointment — which day works best for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I can go Wednesday, 14th December, 1pm.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, Wednesday the 14th at 1pm is available. Could I take your full name for the booking?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, my name is Vic Lemmis.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thank you, Vic Lemmis. Could I have a contact phone number for the appointment? Yes is 435678980

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks for the number. Could I have your date of birth, please?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks for that. Do you have a preferred doctor you’d like to see, or is any doctor okay?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Any doctor is good

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, any doctor is fine. Do you have a Medicare or insurance number you’d like us to add to the booking?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I have, 5678943

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, I’ve added that number. Is this your first visit to our clinic?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, my first

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, since it’s your first visit, do you have any medical allergies we should note in your file?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: No, I don’t

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, thanks for confirming that. Would you like an SMS reminder for your appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, SMS reminder is set. Is there anything else you’d like the doctor to know before your appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I think no

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, everything’s set for your appointment. Would you like directions to the clinic for Wednesday?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. We’re on Main Street, just opposite the big post office — you’ll see a blue sign that says Riverside Medical Clinic. Would you like parking information as well?
